<!-- source-hash: 56c84f16fc2057419b3b8242ebe88efc -->
REST controller exposing the external API endpoints for querying integrated tools and retrieving their available filter options under `/api/v1/tools`.

## Key Components

| Element | Description |
|---|---|
| `getTools()` | `GET /api/v1/tools` — Returns a pageable list of integrated tools with optional filtering by `enabled`, `type`, `category`, `search`, and sort parameters |
| `getToolFilters()` | `GET /api/v1/tools/filters` — Returns available filter options (types, categories, etc.) for the tools listing UI |
| `ToolFilterCriteria` | Builder-constructed filter object passed to `ToolService.queryTools()` |
| `SortInput` | Wraps `sortField` and `sortDirection` into a reusable sort descriptor |
| `ToolMapper` | Maps service layer results to external-facing DTOs (`ToolsResponse`, `ToolFilterResponse`) |

## Usage Example

```java
// GET /api/v1/tools?enabled=true&type=psa&search=connectwise&sortField=name&sortDirection=ASC
// Headers: X-API-Key-Id: <key>

// Response: ToolsResponse
{
  "tools": [
    {
      "id": "tool-123",
      "name": "ConnectWise Manage",
      "type": "psa",
      "category": "ticketing",
      "enabled": true
    }
  ]
}

// GET /api/v1/tools/filters
// Response: ToolFilterResponse
{
  "types": ["psa", "rmm", "billing"],
  "categories": ["ticketing", "monitoring", "invoicing"]
}
```

## Request Parameters — `GET /api/v1/tools`

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `enabled` | `Boolean` | No | Filter by enabled status |
| `type` | `String` | No | Filter by tool type |
| `search` | `String` | No | Search in name and description |
| `category` | `String` | No | Filter by category |
| `sortField` | `String` | No | Field to sort by |
| `sortDirection` | `String` | No (default: `ASC`) | `ASC` or `DESC` |

> Authentication is enforced via `X-User-Id` and `X-API-Key-Id` headers, passed internally and not exposed in the public API surface.
